title: THE 2PM CLUB™ Bedford - Christmas Daytime Disco
description: Your Christmas daytime rave lands in Bedford. The 2PM Club packs four hours of 80s, 90s and 00s classics into one festive-soaked afternoon at Bedford Esquires. Think Whitney confetti moments, Robbie singalongs, and everyone in sequins or Santa hats, losing themselves in the music before dinner time. It's the no-hangover Christmas party: maximum fun, minimum faff. When Bon Jovi or Mariah hits and the whole room erupts, you'll know why this is the festive tradition that actually works.
